creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: amdmi3
Date: Thu Apr 24 23:18:26 2014
New Revision: 352078
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352078
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352078/

Log:
  - update from ancient 20100131 snapshot to proper 1.1 release
  - bumps up PORTEPOCH because of weird versioning
  - add LICENSE
  - add dependency on tkabber-1.1
  - add pkg-message to describe how to use plugins
  - pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188257
  Submitted by:	Mikhail <mp39590@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	Volodymyr Kostyrko <c.kworr@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/pkg-message   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/files/
Modified:
  head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/Makefile
  head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/distinfo
  head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/Makefile	Thu Apr 24 23:17:29 2014	(r352077)
+++ head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/Makefile	Thu Apr 24 23:18:26 2014	(r352078)
@@ -2,41 +2,32 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tkabber-plugins
-PORTVERSION=	20100131
-CATEGORIES=	net-im
-MASTER_SITES=	http://wizard.volgograd.ru/distfiles/
+PORTVERSION=	1.1
+PORTEPOCH=	1
+CATEGORIES=	net-im tcl tk
+MASTER_SITES=	http://files.jabber.ru/tkabber/
 
-MAINTAINER=	c.kworr@gmail.com
+MAINTAINER=	mp39590@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	External Plugins for Tkabber
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	tkabber-devel>=0.11.1.a.20100207:${PORTSDIR}/net-im/tkabber-devel
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
+RUN_DEPENDS=	tkabber==1.1:${PORTSDIR}/net-im/tkabber
+
+USES=		tar:xz
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-PKGMESSAGE=	${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
-SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
-SUBDIRS=	aniemoticons attline bc browser checkers chess ctcomp \
-		custom-urls cyrillize debug ejabberd floatingcontact \
+SUBDIRS=	aniemoticons attline battleship bc browser checkers chess \
+		ctcomp custom-urls cyrillize debug ejabberd floatingcontact \
 		floatinglog georoster gmail iconsets jidlink latex mute \
-		openurl osd poker presencecmd quiz quotelastmsg receipts \
+		openurl osd otr poker presencecmd quiz quotelastmsg receipts \
 		renju reversi singularity socials spy stripes tclchat \
 		tkabber-khim traffic unixkeys whiteboard
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 do-install:
-	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
-	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "${SUBDIRS}" ${DATADIR})
-
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-.  for i in COPYING ChangeLog README
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${DOCSDIR}
-.  endfor
-.endif
-
-	${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
+	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "${SUBDIRS} README" ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR})
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/distinfo	Thu Apr 24 23:17:29 2014	(r352077)
+++ head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/distinfo	Thu Apr 24 23:18:26 2014	(r352078)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (tkabber-plugins-20100131.tar.bz2) = 13666978a693d8f31c62a446305cd2e904c432b0f2e20a89c0be86d29ae064c6
-SIZE (tkabber-plugins-20100131.tar.bz2) = 713812
+SHA256 (tkabber-plugins-1.1.tar.xz) = bed048d0e62dd82b125ae393195800280ddd9f8c6416a2de0a3ce84d601621b7
+SIZE (tkabber-plugins-1.1.tar.xz) = 670204

Added: head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/pkg-message
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/net-im/tkabber-plugins/pkg-message	Thu Apr 24 23:18:26 2014	(r352078)
@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+For complete review of the installed plugins look inside README document
+installed allong with this package.
+
+To use plugins create a link of installation folder to your
+~/.tkabber/plugins directory.
+
+Then start Tkabber and use Tkabber->Customize->Plugins Management menu
+to activate particular plugin.
